description: Synthetic safe examples for Sounding distribution diagnostics. Values are placeholders and must not be replaced with generated local output.

checks.message: Required distribution tools are available.
checks.guidance: Continue with project and credential readiness checks.

checks.message: Developer ID identity check skipped because no selector was supplied.
checks.guidance: Install a local Developer ID Application certificate and rerun the check.

checks.message: Notary credential check skipped because no credential label was supplied.
checks.guidance: Configure operator-local notarization credentials before real notarization.

checks.message: Distribution workspace is writable and raw logs are isolated locally.
checks.guidance: Inspect ignored local logs only when private diagnostics are needed.

checks.message: App verification evidence is ready for packaging.
checks.guidance: Continue with archive and package creation.

checks.message: Unsigned Release app bundle was built and staged.
checks.guidance: Use the staged app for dry-run packaging or credential-gated signing.

checks.message: Developer ID signing skipped during dry-run packaging.
checks.guidance: Install a local Developer ID Application certificate and rerun the check.

checks.message: DMG was created and verified.
checks.guidance: Use the generated DMG for credential-gated notarization when running in real mode.

checks.message: Notary submission skipped during dry-run packaging.
checks.guidance: Configure operator-local notarization credentials before real notarization.

checks.message: Stapling skipped during dry-run packaging.
checks.guidance: Retry stapling after notarization succeeds and inspect the local stapler log.

checks.message: Gatekeeper assessment skipped during dry-run packaging.
checks.guidance: Inspect local Gatekeeper assessment output for the generated artifact.

checks.message: Distribution workspace is writable and raw logs are isolated locally.
checks.guidance: Inspect ignored local logs only when private diagnostics are needed.

checks.message: Fixture App verification evidence is missing.
checks.guidance: Run fixture app verification locally and pass its redacted JSON evidence to packaging.

checks.message: Live App verification evidence is missing.
checks.guidance: Run authorized live app verification locally and pass its redacted JSON evidence to packaging.

checks.message: Required package tools are available.
checks.guidance: Continue with the package workflow.

checks.message: App verification evidence is ready for packaging.
checks.guidance: Continue with archive and package creation.

checks.message: Developer ID Application identity selector did not match a usable local certificate.
checks.guidance: Install a local Developer ID Application certificate and rerun the check.

checks.message: Notary submission failed or was rejected.
checks.guidance: Inspect the local notary log in the ignored distribution workspace.

checks.message: Notary wait reported a rejected package.
checks.guidance: Inspect the local notary log in the ignored distribution workspace.

checks.message: Notary diagnostics were preserved in the local ignored workspace.
checks.guidance: Inspect the local notary log in the ignored distribution workspace.

checks.message: Stapling failed.
checks.guidance: Retry stapling after notarization succeeds and inspect the local stapler log.

checks.message: Gatekeeper assessment failed.
checks.guidance: Inspect local Gatekeeper assessment output for the generated artifact.

checks.message: DMG verification failed.
checks.guidance: Inspect the local DMG creation or verification log in the ignored distribution workspace.

checks.message: redactionFailure
checks.guidance: Do not emit raw tool output; inspect ignored local logs instead.
